---
title: "Andrew E. Jaffe"
image: "Jaffe.jpg"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/ajaffe/"
  - label: Book a Call
    url: "https://calendly.com/andrewejaffe/30min"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:andrewejaffe@gmail.com"
  - label: Scholar
    url: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=SYXodmQAAAAJ&hl=en"
  - label: Resume
    url: "resume.pdf"
output:
  postcards::trestles:
    css: styles.css
---

#### About

I'm a data science and computational biology executive with 15+ years of experience building and leading cross-functional data science, machine learning, and computational biology teams — most recently as VP, Head of Data Sciences at [Neumora Therapeutics](https://www.neumoratx.com). I translate between data science, life sciences, and clinical sciences to maximize the impact of drug discovery and development programs, from early target discovery through Phase 3 clinical trials.

I'm currently exploring new full-time leadership roles in biotech and pharma, and taking on a limited number of fractional and advisory engagements.

#### Consulting

<div class="aej-card-grid">
<div class="aej-card">
<h5>Fractional / interim leadership</h5>
<p>Embedded, part-time Head/VP of Data Science for biotech companies that need senior leadership without a full-time hire.</p>
</div>
<div class="aej-card">
<h5>Hourly advisory</h5>
<p>Strategy sessions and technical review on data science, computational biology, and team-building questions.</p>
</div>
<div class="aej-card">
<h5>Project-based engagements</h5>
<p>Scoped projects such as a data science org build-out plan, computational pipeline audit, or genomics data strategy.</p>
</div>
</div>

<a class="aej-btn" href="https://calendly.com/andrewejaffe/30min">Book a 30-min call</a>

#### Expertise

<div class="aej-tags">
<span class="aej-tag">Data science team leadership</span>
<span class="aej-tag">AI/ML for clinical development</span>
<span class="aej-tag">Computational biology & genomics</span>
<span class="aej-tag">Clinical data science</span>
<span class="aej-tag">AI/ML for drug discovery</span>
</div>

#### Experience

<div class="aej-card-grid">
<div class="aej-card">
<h5>VP, Head of Data Sciences — Neumora Therapeutics</h5>
<p class="aej-dates">2020–2026</p>
<p>Led a cross-functional data science, ML, and computational biology team spanning the full drug discovery/development pipeline, from target discovery through Phase 3 neuropsychiatric and neurodegenerative trials. Co-inventor on multiple clinical ML and therapeutic-use patents. Developed fit-for-purpose development strategies to enhance drug response and reduce placebo response using wide array of data modalities.</p>
</div>
<div class="aej-card">
<h5>Group Leader, Data Science & Lead Investigator — Lieber Institute for Brain Development</h5>
<p class="aej-dates">2013–2020</p>
<p>Built and led a lab of 10+ scientists studying the genomics of brain development and severe mental illness. Principal Investigator on 10 NIH grants totaling $20M+. Published 145+ research articles (H-index 65).</p>
</div>
<div class="aej-card">
<h5> Professor (Adjunct) — Johns Hopkins University</h5>
<p class="aej-dates">2013–Present</p>
<p>Departments of Psychiatry & Behavioral Sciences and Neuroscience </p>
</div>
</div>

#### Education

- PhD, Epidemiology (Human Genetics/Genetic Epidemiology) — Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health, 2011
- MHS, Bioinformatics — Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health, 2011

#### Publications

145+ peer-reviewed research articles, an H-index of 69, and recognition as a Highly Cited Researcher (top 1% of research, 2018). Full list on [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=SYXodmQAAAAJ&hl=en).
